{info:title=Источник}
Сгенерировано из: {{docs/nautilus/professional-colleague-agents-en/README.md}}
Дата: 2026-04-29
{info}

h1. professional-colleague-agents-en

_Файлов:_ 13

h2. Содержание

* [00-abstract.md|00-abstract.md] — 
* [01-five-type-typology.md|01-five-type-typology.md] — 
* [02-what-makes-pca.md|02-what-makes-pca.md] — 
* [03-empirical-case-obuchay.md|03-empirical-case-obuchay.md] — 
* [04-architecture.md|04-architecture.md] — 
* [05-economics-replication.md|05-economics-replication.md] — 
* [06-risks.md|06-risks.md] — > [!TIP]
* [07-application-domains.md|07-application-domains.md] — > [!TIP]
* [08-pilot-sgb-advocate.md|08-pilot-sgb-advocate.md] — 
* [09-relationship-other-agents.md|09-relationship-other-agents.md] — 
* [10-open-questions.md|10-open-questions.md] — 
* [11-call-for-collaboration.md|11-call-for-collaboration.md] — 
* [12-closing.md|12-closing.md] — 



----

_Похожие документы:_
* [211-table-of-contents|docs/obsidian/02-anthropic-vacancies/211-table-of-contents.md] (сходство 0.37)
* [211-table-of-contents|docs/02-anthropic-vacancies/211-table-of-contents.md] (сходство 0.30)
* [README|docs/nautilus/composite-skills-agents/README.md] (сходство 0.30)
